message:
Running command: # Good - dir:: is a librelane relative path prefix, not a broken path.

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper
timeout 45 librelane --pdk-root /nc/pdk --pdk sky130A --run-tag pnr_run_v2 --to Yosys.JsonHeader config.json 2>&1 | tail -25
